news.t: This legendary investor has been shorting Treasury bonds. Here's how to bet with him — without going broke.

overview.description: The Proshares Short 20+ Year Treasury (TBF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the US Treasury 20+ Year index. The fund provides daily inverse exposure to a market-value-weighted index that tracks the performance of US Treasury securities with remaining maturities greater than 20 years. TBF was launched on Aug 20, 2009 and is issued by ProShares.
